visual_summary: CollectionFeature is a component that displays a collection of features or components. It is used when a developer wants to showcase a set of related components. It features a title, description, and a grid of components.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: CollectionFeature
Description: CollectionFeature is a component that displays a collection of features or components. It is used when a developer wants to showcase a set of related components. It features a title, description, and a grid of components.
Style: 
Interactions: none
Tags: collection, components, grid

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/CollectionFeature.astro
---
import { type CollectionEntry } from 'astro:content'

import { ArrowRight } from '@lucide/astro'

import ComponentCard from './ComponentCard.astro'

interface Props {
  title: string
  description: string
  slug: string
  components: (
    | CollectionEntry<'application'>['data']
    | CollectionEntry<'marketing'>['data']
    | CollectionEntry<'neobrutalism'>['data']
  )[]
}

const { title, description, slug, components } = Astro.props
---

<section
